title: News
text:
Leadership Bios
Learn more about NLR's director, associate lab directors, and the leadership team.
About NLR
NLR is the U.S. Department of Energy's primary national laboratory for energy systems. From foundational research to accelerating market adoption, NLR applies its deep technical expertise and unique breadth of capabilities to drive the successful integration of our nation's energy resources and systems. Learn more about NLR and see facts and figures such as number of partners, patents, publications, and staff.
For media inquiries, contact a member of our media relations team.
